metadata.title: GuideMatch Service Value | GuideMatch
metadata.description: Introducing GuideMatch's tour philosophy, operation standards, and service values implemented through verified local guides and travelers.

hero.badge: The most sophisticated way to connect local guides and travelers
hero.description: GuideMatch creates a structure where verified local guides and travelers connect directly. Starting from the premise that who you travel with determines the density of your journey, we design a booking experience where guide expertise and traveler taste align perfectly.

matching.label: Matching
matching.title: Profile-centric Matching
matching.desc: Compare travel purposes and guide strengths directly to choose.

trust.label: Trust
trust.title: Verification-based Trust
trust.desc: Operating attitude and expertise are more important than intro text.

experience.label: Experience
experience.title: High-sensitivity Local Experience
experience.desc: We aim for travel that interprets the region rather than just consuming famous spots.

hero.standardText: When traveler's taste and guide's expertise meet accurately, travel becomes much deeper.

perspective.label: Our Perspective
perspective.title:
Why a travel platform
needs brand standards
perspective.description: Many travel services focus on location and price. However, actual satisfaction varies greatly depending on who you travel with and in what flow. GuideMatch focuses on narrowing that gap. We believe a better experience can be created repeatedly only when there's a structure connecting guide expertise, traveler taste, and field context.
perspective.quote: A good guide doesn't just show the way. They change the way travelers understand the city.

transparency.title: Transparent Booking Structure
transparency.description: Travelers can clearly check and choose product descriptions, inclusions, schedules, and price structures. Guides explain the value of the experience they designed themselves.

expertise.title: Verified Local Expertise
expertise.description: Our profile-centric structure considering city understanding, language skills, tour experience, and attitude helps judge the quality of travel.

design.title: Real Local Experience Design
design.description: We pursue human-centered experience design that conveys the context and story of the region, beyond just consuming spots.

howItWorks.label: How It Works
howItWorks.title:
The process of travelers
and guides meeting better
howItWorks.description: The core of GuideMatch is the selection process rather than the booking itself. Satisfaction increases when information is clearly visible, comparison is possible, and expectations on site are met. That's why we emphasize explanatory power in the pre-matching stage.
howItWorks.matchingText: We build a structure where the grounds for selection remain, not just a simple booking flow.

step1.title: Define travel goals and tastes
step1.description: Clearly organize the direction of the desired experience based on city, schedule, persons, and themes. The right guide varies depending on whether it's a family trip, food exploration, or cultural commentary.

step2.title: Compare profiles and choose directly
step2.description: You can choose a partner who fits your trip by looking at the guide's intro, operating style, language, expertise, and suggested routes.

step3.title: Deeper travel starts on site
step3.description: Beyond simple movement and explanation, complete the experience with a speed and atmosphere tailored to the traveler's tendency by understanding the context of the region.

benefits.label: Built For Both Sides
benefits.title:
A platform that makes sense
for both travelers and guides

traveler.title: For Travelers
traveler.description: We provide an information structure where you can actually choose the right person for your trip and predict the outcome, rather than just ending at search results.
list: Directly compare and choose guides matching your travel style
Free itineraries away from the uniform routes of group packages
Deeply understand local context without language and culture barriers

guide.title: For Guides
guide.description: A good guide doesn't grow by just getting more bookings. Sustainable operation is possible only when they clearly show their expertise and style and meet customers who fit them.
list: A digital space to showcase your own travel philosophy and expertise
Increased service satisfaction by connecting with like-minded travelers
A fair compensation system and protection guaranteed from the booking stage

revenue.title: Revenue
revenue.desc: Design your settlement flow and sales structure more clearly.

profile.title: Profile
profile.desc: Your profile and content become the guide's brand asset.

gallery.label: Scene Gallery
gallery.title: Moments where real travel becomes richer
gallery.description: Images are not just decorations; they are evidence of the depth and presence of the travel that GuideMatch aims for.

card1.title: Hidden Alley Tour
card1.description: Walk through the real back alleys of Seoul that only guides know, not shown on maps.

card2.title: Local Gourmet Experience
card2.description: Meet real flavors in markets and old shops where local lives are lived, not in tourist restaurants.

card3.title: Rediscovery of Cultural Heritage
card3.description: Feel the breath of history reinterpreted in current perspectives, not just textbook explanations.

promise.label: GuideMatch Promise
promise.title:
The core of a more professional-looking service is
clear standards rather than good-looking sentences
promise.description: GuideMatch aims to be a platform that connects people and experiences more sophisticatedly, not just a platform that sells travel. We help travelers find better-fitting guides and guides create more memorable services.

trust.label: Trust
trust.desc: Travel platform with an explainable trust structure

partnership.label: Partnership
partnership.desc: Operation considering the balance between traveler satisfaction and guide growth

locality.label: Locality
locality.desc: Local experiences that make you understand rather than just consume the city
